Off Calendar Apr-27-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS CENTRAL TOWERS JOINT VENTURE, LLC dba MOSSER TOWERS, individually and dba CENTRAL TOWERS, THE MOSSER COMPANIES, INC., individually and dba PROPERTY MANAGEMENT MERCHANDISE'S GENERAL AND SPECIAL DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFFS' COMPLAINT.
APPEARANCES: Ryan T. Dunn, Esq. of Gordon & Ress LLP 986-5900 for defts & moving parties (appearing via CourtCall); no other appearances.

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-27-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS CENTRAL TOWERS JOINT VENTURE, LLC dba MOSSER TOWERS, individually and dba CENTRAL TOWERS, THE MOSSER COMPANIES, INC., individually and dba PROPERTY MANAGEMENT MERCHANDISE'S MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF PLAINTIFFS' COMPLAINT.
APPEARANCES: Ryan T. Dunn, Esq. of Gordon & Ress LLP 986-5900 for defts & moving parties (appearing via CourtCall); no other appearances.
RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling - Motion to Strike is granted with ten days leave to amend. Plaintiffs must plead facts to support punitive damages claim and facts to show corporate ratification. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) (302/CWW/SK) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797
